Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Replace Google Scholar with ANPEC searcher and log extraction results

Google Scholar excluded due to 12k+ irrelevant results; relevant
journals already covered by CAPES and RePEc. Add ANPEC searcher
\(site:anpec.org.br via Google Search, import Excel/RIS/CSV\).
Update README with extraction log: 132 raw records from 4 databases,
125 unique after deduplication.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Complete LLM analysis of 118 papers \(87 approved, 31 rejected\)

Add standalone analysis script with checkpoint recovery and improve
Gemini API retry logic for 429/RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED errors with
retryDelay extraction and exponential backoff.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash("c:/OneDrive/github/pndr_survey/_audit_tmp.py" << 'ENDOFSCRIPT'
import re
import json

# 12. tabela_ic.tex
with open\("latex/tabela_ic.tex", "r", encoding="utf-8"\) as f:
    tex = f.read\(\)

citeonline = re.findall\(r"\\\\citeonline\\{\([^}]+\)\\}", tex\)
rows = [l for l in tex.split\("\\n"\) if "&" in l and "\\\\\\\\" in l]
print\(f"=== 12. tabela_ic.tex ==="\)
print\(f"Data rows: {len\(rows\)}"\)
print\(f"citeonline refs: {len\(citeonline\)}"\)
print\(f"Contains Oliveira2026: {'Oliveira2026' in tex}"\)
for l in tex.split\("\\n"\):
    if "oliveira" in l.lower\(\):
        print\(f"  {l.strip\(\)[:150]}"\)

# 13. pipeline_extraction.md
print\(\)
with open\("docs/pipeline_extraction.md", "r", encoding="utf-8"\) as f:
    md = f.read\(\)
print\("=== 13. pipeline_extraction.md ==="\)
for line in md.split\("\\n"\):
    if re.search\(r"\\d{2,}", line\) and line.strip\(\):
        print\(f"  {line.strip\(\)[:160]}"\)
print\(f"Contains oliveira: {'oliveira' in md.lower\(\)}"\)
for l in md.split\("\\n"\):
    if "oliveira" in l.lower\(\):
        print\(f"  Oliveira: {l.strip\(\)[:160]}"\)

# 14. README.md
print\(\)
with open\("README.md", "r", encoding="utf-8"\) as f:
    readme = f.read\(\)
print\("=== 14. README.md ==="\)
for line in readme.split\("\\n"\):
    if re.search\(r"\\d{2,}", line\) and line.strip\(\):
        print\(f"  {line.strip\(\)[:160]}"\)
print\(f"Contains oliveira: {'oliveira' in readme.lower\(\)}"\)
ENDOFSCRIPT)

Bash("c:/OneDrive/github/pndr_survey/.venv/Scripts/python.exe" -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\(''c:/OneDrive/github/pndr_survey/data/2-papers/all_papers_llm_classif_final.xlsx''\)
ws = wb[wb.sheetnames[0]]
headers = [cell.value for cell in ws[1]]
col_idx = {h: i for i, h in enumerate\(headers\) if h}

# Check S2_metodo_econometrico values for approved papers
from collections import Counter
metodos = Counter\(\)
for row in ws.iter_rows\(min_row=2, values_only=True\):
    if row[0] is None:
        continue
    triagem = str\(row[col_idx.get\(''Triagem'', -1\)] or ''''\)
    if triagem.upper\(\) != ''APROVADO'':
        continue
    mi = col_idx.get\(''S2_metodo_econometrico''\)
    if mi is None:
        mi = col_idx.get\(''S2_m\\u00e9todo_econom\\u00e9trico''\)
    val = str\(row[mi] or ''''\) if mi is not None else ''''
    if val and val != ''None'':
        metodos[val] += 1

print\(''S2_metodo_econometrico unique values \(first 10\):''\)
for m, c in metodos.most_common\(10\):
    print\(f''  [{c}] {repr\(m[:100]\)}''\)
print\(f''Total distinct: {len\(metodos\)}''\)

# Also show S2_detalhes_metodo
print\(\)
print\(''Column headers containing metodo:''\)
for h in headers:
    if h and ''metodo'' in str\(h\).lower\(\):
        print\(f''  {repr\(h\)} -> idx {col_idx[h]}''\)
")

Bash("c:/OneDrive/github/pndr_survey/.venv/Scripts/python.exe" -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\(''c:/OneDrive/github/pndr_survey/data/2-papers/all_papers_llm_classif_final.xlsx''\)
print\(''Sheets:'', wb.sheetnames\)
ws = wb[''Resumo'']
# Check if it''s the old version \(row 3 col B = 118\) or rebuilt version \(130\)
val = ws.cell\(row=3, column=2\).value
print\(f''Row 3 col B \(total registros\): {val}''\)
# Check period row
for r in range\(15, 25\):
    a = ws.cell\(row=r, column=1\).value
    b = ws.cell\(row=r, column=2\).value
    if a:
        print\(f''  Row {r}: {a} = {b}''\)
")
